title: Inter Alia (NT Live 2026-27)
synopsis:
Jessica Parks is a smart Crown Court Judge at the top of her career. Behind the robe, she is a karaoke friend, loving wife and a supportive parent. When an event threatens to throw her life completely off balance, can she hold her family upright?

 

Writer Suzie Miller and director Justin Martin reunite following their global phenomenon Prima Facie, with this searing examination of modern motherhood and masculinity.
subtitle: Chinese
